query: best time of year to visit Patagonia for trekking

bad_state.snippet: Discussion of the best months to visit Patagonia, noting that summer months (November to March) are recommended but landscapes often have snow.

good_state.snippet: This page is a blog post explaining that summer (December to February) is the best time to trek in Patagonia due to favorable weather, while advising preparation for variable conditions.

failure_explanation: The most relevant and authoritative results are buried behind a low-quality Reddit post, which directly matches the contrastive fail description: 'blogs rank above official sources' and 'most relevant result is buried.'
